description_long: This handbag features a rectangular, structured body with a woven texture and a plaid pattern in shades of white, beige, and dark brown. The exterior is made of a tightly woven material, likely synthetic or natural fibers, giving it a semi-soft yet sturdy appearance. Two long, thin straps in a contrasting brown color are attached at the top, designed for shoulder or hand carrying. The bag's sides are narrow, emphasizing its elongated profile, and the top opening appears wide for easy access. There are no visible external pockets, hardware, or decorative elements, giving it a minimalist and functional look. The interior is not visible, but it is likely lined with fabric or a synthetic material.
description: A rectangular, plaid-patterned woven handbag with two long brown straps and a minimalist, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full plaid pattern, rectangular shape, and both straps resting above the opening.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and the thickness of the woven material, with one strap visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the plaid pattern and both straps from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and strap attachment.
attribute_strap_type: Two long, fixed shoulder straps made of synthetic leather, attached at the top corners.
attribute_closure_mechanism: No visible closure mechanism; likely an open-top design.
attribute_pattern: Plaid pattern with horizontal and vertical stripes in white, beige, and brown tones.
